nl_query: Show the attempt rule configuration for question 2 in the Data Structures paper.
failed_sql:
SELECT ar.id AS rule_id, ar.rule_type, ar.min_select, ar.max_select, ar.config_json
FROM   answer_script as
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = as.id
JOIN   attempt_rule ar ON ar.question_id = ea.question_id
WHERE  as.course_id = 1001 -- Assuming course_id 1001 is the Data Structures paper
  AND  ea.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY'
  AND  ea.question_id = 2
LIMIT  1;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): evaluation_attempt.question_id, evaluation_attempt.question_id, attempt_rule.script_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
